content.en:
"Phosphorus-free Great Ancestor, where is the Eternal True Ruin?"

The Heavenly Ancestors asked.

Although the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor knew that he was not afraid of any Heavenly Ancestor in this realm, he would always go out one day, so he didn't want to offend so many Heavenly Ancestors.

Moreover, he had already obtained the Eternal Realm Stone and became the Lord of the Realm, even if he told these Heavenly Ancestors the location of the Eternal True Ruins, there would be no loss for him.

So, the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor revealed: "Many Heavenly Ancestors, the location of the Eternal True Ruins is here!"

He unleashed balls of light, each of which recorded the location of the Eternal Ruins.

After these Heavenly Ancestors obtained the location of the Eternal True Ruins, they immediately left.

"Sell the location of the Eternal Ruins in the Universal Alliance in exchange for some resources!"

The Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor decided.

Anyway, this position has been exposed, so earning some resources before it spreads completely is also an excellent deal for him!

As a result, he began to sell the location of the Eternal True Ruins on the Cosmos Alliance's Space-Time Network.

......

"Eternal Ruins!"

As soon as Ye Tian entered the space-time network of the Universal Alliance, he saw that many Great Ancestors were discussing the matter of the Eternal True Ruins.

He understood it, and he knew what the Eternal True Ruins were.

The Eternal True Ruins are very dangerous, there are quite a few fifth-stage Great Ancestors who died in the Eternal True Ruins, and even the Great Ancestors of the Invincible Fifth Stage have fallen more than one.

However, there are still many Great Ancestors who are willing to venture into the Eternal True Ruins, just because there are too many opportunities inside the Eternal True Ruins.

However, the Eternal True Ruins suppressed the strength of the Heavenly Ancestor very much, and even if the Heavenly Ancestor entered the Eternal True Ruins, at most he could only exert the invincible fifth-stage combat power.

Therefore, the Heavenly Ancestors did not dare to enter the Eternal True Ruins, lest they fall into the Eternal True Ruins.

Those who really dared to enter the Eternal True Ruins were a few Invincible-level fifth-stage Great Ancestors and boundary-breaking fifth-stage Great Ancestors.

However, the Boundary-Breaking Fifth Stage Great Ancestor was too rare, and there were not many in this era.

Therefore, the main force that entered the Eternal True Ruins was still the Invincible Level Fifth Stage Great Ancestor.

"It's the position of the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor selling the Eternal True Ruins, and he only needs ten ruins of gold!"

Ye Tian did not hesitate at all, and directly traded with the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor, and the trading location was the Phosphorus-Free Territory of the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor.

It didn't take long for him to reach the phosphorus-free territory.

"Endless Great Ancestor, you can trade the location of the Eternal True Ruins, but don't go in, even if I rely on the Infinite Realm Armor, I will almost not be able to come back!"

If it was an ordinary Great Ancestor, he wouldn't have reminded him like this.

But Ye Tian was different, he traded a large amount of ruin gold from Ye Tian's hands, which was able to urge the Infinite Realm Armor Warrior, thus seizing the Eternal Realm Stone in the Eternal True Ruins.

Therefore, Ye Tian is kind to him!

"Thank you for the reminder!"

After Ye Tian obtained the location of the Eternal True Ruins, he left.

......

Ye Tian was not in a hurry to go to the Eternal True Ruins, if he went without any preparation, he was afraid that it would be easy to fall.

Even the Infinite Realm Armor of the Invincible Fifth Stage Combat Power could not protect the Phosphorusless Great Ancestor, and the Infinite Realm Armor could kill him in seconds!

However, fortunately, the puppet of the Infinite Realm Armor has a second form, which is to wrap the Great Ancestor in order to protect the Great Ancestor.

It's just that in this way, once the enemy's attack exceeds the defense of the Infinite Realm Armor, it will instantly shatter his body and kill him.

Therefore, unless it is a special case, the Great Ancestors will not act in this way.

Using the Infinite Realm Armor to face danger in front, and the Great Ancestors to sit in the rear, this is the most commonly used way of fighting.

Of course, the Infinite Realm Armor can't be too far away, otherwise it will be easy to be uncontrollable.

"It's very difficult for the Infinite Realm Armor to be copied, so we can't let the Infinite Realm Armor lose it as much as possible!"

Subsequently, Ye Tian made some plans.

After making the plan, he headed to the Eternal True Ruins with plenty of ruin gold and the Infinite Realm armor.

The Eternal Ruins are located in a special time and space, and if there is no space-time node, it is difficult to find this piece of Eternal True Ruins.

Even if there was a specific location, it took Ye Tian a little time to find the Eternal True Ruins.

I don't know how the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor found the Eternal True Ruin, maybe it's luck!

"So many Great Ancestors!"

Ye Tian came to the space-time barrier outside the Eternal True Ruins, and sensed the existence of many Great Ancestors.

"That's ......"

Ye Tian saw a Heavenly Ancestor, although they restrained their breath, but a glance at it still made people's hearts palpitate.

Obviously, the location of the Eternal Ruins is known to many forces.

The Heavenly Ancestors did not dare to enter the Eternal True Ruins, so they only dared to wait outside the Eternal True Ruins.

"Heavenly Ancestors should have sent the Fifth Stage Great Ancestors in!"

Ye Tian guessed.

At this moment, he also knew that many Great Ancestors' eyes were focused on him.

He knew that the cultivation of his fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms was a little out of place here, after all, the weakest of the Great Ancestors who came here were all top-level fifth-stage combat power, and most of them were peak fifth-stage combat power.

It was really a little strange that he had just a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform here!

Of course, these Great Ancestors only paid attention to Ye Tian for a few seconds and then stopped paying attention.

"There are not many Great Ancestors who dare to enter the Eternal True Ruins, most of them are still waiting!"

Ye Tian did not hesitate and directly entered the Eternal True Ruins.

This scene made the other Great Ancestors stunned, and they began to talk about it.

"Just now a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform has entered the Eternal True Ruins?

"You read that right, it is indeed a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform!"

"Is this Great Ancestor looking for death? A mere fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform would dare to enter the Eternal True Ruins? Even if he is a demon, he has immeasurable bones and immeasurable blood all over his body, and has mastered the most top-notch immeasurable supernatural skill marks, and his whole body has been tempered more than a dozen times, and he will be at the top of the fifth-stage combat power. This is still to the limit, he is more likely to be just an ordinary fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, why would he dare to enter the Eternal True Ruins?"

"Maybe you really want to die!"

"In fact, if you don't go deep into the Eternal True Ruins, only on the periphery, the top fifth-stage combat power still has a chance to survive, but if you want to gain something, it's almost impossible!"

Eternal ruins.

After Ye Tian entered here, the immeasurable bones all over his body were sizzling, and the power suppression here was too strong.

And the reversal of time and space made him almost lose his bearings.

The environment is like a ruin, but everything seems like it is.

He looked around vigilantly and slowly flew towards the depths of the Eternal True Ruins.
